title: oakparkmi.gov
description: Oak Park, Michigan, is a vibrant, diverse inner-ring suburb of Metro Detroit located in Oakland County. Incorporated as a city in 1945, it spans 5.5 square miles and is home to roughly 30,000 residents. The city is currently experiencing a renaissance, transforming areas like the 11 Mile Road corridor into bustling hubs with breweries, restaurants, and new community spaces.
